name: How do I start GEO for my small law practice in Chicago?
description: List client Qs, answer directly with local details, add bios; test in AI.[3][6]

mainEntity.name: How do I start GEO for my small law practice in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: List client Qs, answer directly with local details, add bios; test in AI.[3][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Begin by listing 50+ real client questions like 'breach of contract damages in Illinois' and answer them concisely on your site.**[3][6] Use procedural references (e.g., Chicago courthouse details) and attorney bylines for credibility.[3] **Key factors:** 1. Focus on utility: embed maps, forms.[3] 2. Update FAQs regularly.[4] 3. Test in Perplexity/ChatGPT. **Implement in 1 week: create FAQ pages, optimize existing posts, monitor AI responses monthly.**[4] Small firms can dominate locally with GEO.[3]
